name: multi-field-mesh-determinism
description: Wave 3 Phase 5d — E6 mesh-extraction determinism baseline. Renders the Multi-Field scene in atlas mode, then invokes `__canaryExtractMeshDeterminism()` to run the cascade → MC → welding → normals pipeline against the live atlas and capture a deterministic summary (vertex/triangle/brick counts, bbox, FNV-1a hashes of vertex/index/normal buffers, first 3 sample positions + normals). The summary becomes the golden across runs; any change in the MC table, welding epsilon, normal direction, sampling cadence, or per-atom dispatch ordering produces a different hash → test failure. NO pixel-diff — this is a programmatic (numeric) determinism check. Cross-hardware safe because the pipeline is pure CPU + same FieldTape evaluator. Pixel-diff tests in `d1-lipschitz` and `multiscale-overlays` cover the GPU side; this fixture catches CPU-side regressions the pixel-diff path would miss.
